scopes.name: changeset
scopes.description: files under .changeset used for change logging and config (e.g., .changeset/config.json, README in changeset).

scopes.name: src
scopes.description: source code implementing the library (e.g., src/index.ts, src/formatter.ts, src/dts-generator.ts, etc.).

scopes.name: tests
scopes.description: test suites and test configurations (e.g., tests/index.test.ts, vitest.config.ts, tsconfig for tests).
